targetUser: Operator, consultant or founder summarizing work evidence for human review.
businessJob: Show how work evidence could become a value and review summary without storing raw evidence here.
valueHypothesis: A future Capsule could help connect work artifacts to reviewable value claims while preserving human approval and evidence boundaries.
day1UserBenefit: A visitor sees how a Capsule could explain value review structure without raw evidence, legal audit proof or compliance certification.

publicSafeExamples: Conceptual evidence category with no raw evidence
forbiddenData: No email, phone, DNI, customerId or tenantId
No connector payload, API key or provider key
No prompt text, raw evidence or private runtime path

runtimeBoundary: No private runtime is included; this manifest is not executable and does not validate evidence.
connectorBoundary: No connector execution is included; evidence systems and file sources remain outside C03.
dataBoundary: No secrets, no customer data, no telemetry, no PII, no prompt text, no raw evidence and no connector payloads are included.
complianceBoundary: No regulated advice, compliance certification, legal audit proof or ROI guarantee is provided.
ipBoundary: This public manifest preserves the source-available launcher posture and does not expose private runtime code.
cloudHandoffBoundary: Future Cloud handoff would require separate approved implementation and review before any hosted behavior exists.
localByokBoundary: Future local/BYOK setup would require separate configuration work; no API keys are requested here.
futureImplementationNotes: A future implementation would require private runtime review semantics outside this public manifest.
A future implementation would require approved evidence and data boundaries before any live review exists.
C03 ships manifest only, not executable template behavior.
